creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Garrett Cooper <yaneurabeya@gmail.com> -----

From: Garrett Cooper <yaneurabeya@gmail.com>
To: Garrett Cooper <yaneurabeya@gmail.com>
Subject: Re: ports/127690: Upgrade pexpect from 2.1 to 2.3
Cc: linimon@freebsd.org, freebsd-bugs@freebsd.org, ports@freebsd.org
X-Google-Sender-Auth: 23dd0ba5d1380e52

On Sat, Sep 27, 2008 at 8:15 PM, Garrett Cooper <yaneurabeya@gmail.com> wrote:
> On Sat, Sep 27, 2008 at 7:53 PM,  <linimon@freebsd.org> wrote:
>> Synopsis: Upgrade pexpect from 2.1 to 2.3
>>
>> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
>> State-Changed-By: linimon
>> State-Changed-When: Sun Sep 28 02:52:48 UTC 2008
>> State-Changed-Why:
>> Patch is garbled, please try again.
>>
>> Also, to which port does this apply?
>>
>> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=127690
>
> <misc/py-pexpect>.
>
> I'll resubmit the patch once I get the SVN tree synced; the file I
> provided was a tgz file (should have done straight .tar).
>
> -Garrett

   Please nuke this request. Turns out that portsnap wasn't updating
properly due to pilot error on my part (was using bsd globs instead of
regex globs for my refuse directives in portsnap.conf).
-Garrett


----- End forwarded message -----
